items.name_cn:
Camel
Mon Tresor
Light Blue Leather Mini Bag More Details
Mon Tresor Small Bucket Bag, featuring drawstring and Fendi metal logo. Includes one long and one short detachable shoulder strap, for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear. Light blue calfskin material. Black hand-painted embossed FF logo pattern. Gold hardware. Made in Italy

Style: 226
